title: Add api to delete all the state for an actor
body:
Provide api to delete all the state for an actor alongwith any metadata stored for it.
This is in addition to the api to delete a state with a particular key.

comments.body: @yaron2 If no one is working on this, please assign it to me. Thanks.

> @yaron2 If no one is working on this, please assign it to me. Thanks.

Done, thanks.

I have some questions:
1. Does `TransactionalStateOperation` meet the demand.
2. Should we record all state keys of one actor or should state store support `Keys` operation.

Looking forward to your advice, thanks. @yaron2

https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/service-fabric/service-fabric-reliable-actors-delete-actors
